changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: UPDATE cms_media AS media SET public_url = mapping.new_url, original_filename = substring(mapping.new_url from 2), content_type = 'image/webp' FROM (VALUES ('/PIERRE_RICAUD_brand_banner.jpg', '/PIERRE_RICAUD_brand_banner.webp'), ('/Romanson_brand_banner.png', '/Romanson_brand_banner.webp'), ('/shop.png', '/shop.webp'), ('/romanson.png', '/romanson.webp'), ('/contact-banner-catalog.png', '/contact-banner-catalog.webp'), ('/accessories_hero_banner.png', '/accessories_hero_banner.webp'), ('/Royal_london_brand_banner.png', '/Royal_london_brand_banner.webp'), ('/caseBanner.png', '/caseBanner.webp'), ('/newsBanner.png', '/newsBanner.webp'), ('/product-hero-banner.png', '/product-hero-banner.webp'), ('/catalog-hero-banner.png', '/catalog-hero-banner.webp'), ('/pierre-ricaud.png', '/pierre-ricaud.webp'), ('/braceletBanner.png', '/braceletBanner.webp'), ('/Romanson_banner.png', '/Romanson_banner.webp'), ('/philosophy_1.png', '/philosophy_1.webp'), ('/rhythm.png', '/rhythm.webp'), ('/adriatica.png', '/adriatica.webp'), ('/interior_hero_banner.png', '/interior_hero_banner.webp'), ('/appella.png', '/appella.webp'), ('/about-us-banner.png', '/about-us-banner.webp'), ('/insta-3.png', '/insta-3.webp'), ('/insta-4.png', '/insta-4.webp'), ('/insta-1.png', '/insta-1.webp'), ('/category_3.png', '/category_3.webp'), ('/Rhythm_brand_banner.jpg', '/Rhythm_brand_banner.webp') ) AS mapping(old_url, new_url) WHERE media.storage_type = 'PUBLIC_PATH' AND media.public_url = mapping.old_url;
